paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.26, representing a decrease of 4.86% from the prior close and 27.96% over the last 22 sessions.

There is one new news item in the last 24 hours, with the headline "Fermi Inc. Admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights" from PR Newswire, indicating a recent development in the company's shares.

Recent SEC filings include an 8-K/A form disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, as well as other filings related to convertible senior notes and a schedule 13G filing, with a total of 25 filings in the feed, including 1 form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings.
